modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Surface Book screen is black and unresponsive.

full_description_text: I was using my Microsoft Surface Book when the screen just went black. I tried pressing the keyboard and the power button, but nothing happened. It seems like the device is not responding at all.
short_description: Surface Book screen is black and unresponsive.
description: I was using my Microsoft Surface Book when the screen just went black. I tried pressing the keyboard and the power button, but nothing happened. It seems like the device is not responding at all.
